components.name: ConnectorGateway
components.responsibility: Authenticates and validates external evidence payloads

components.name: EvidenceRegistryService
components.responsibility: Stores canonical evidence entities with lineage

components.name: ReliabilityScoringService
components.responsibility: Computes release readiness scores from weighted metrics

components.name: PolicyEvaluationService
components.responsibility: Evaluates gate policies and produces release decisions

components.name: AuditReportingService
components.responsibility: Produces immutable audit exports and decision summaries
